title: mesosphaerum suaveolens
intro: Mesosphaerum suaveolens, also known as Lemon Bee Balm or Lemon Bee Borage, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum suaveolens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
